headline: NZ Seeks LNG Deal Before November 8 Election

article.summary: New Zealand plans to sign a contract for its first liquefied natural gas import facility before the November election, with the government betting cheaper global LNG prices in coming years will make the fuel an affordable and reliable backup for renewable electricity.
